channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)

👤 Owner: lanyonai

📝 Repository: lanyonai/AdvectionDiffusion

item.title: 📝 SyscallX-18113/Apkx-Hunter (64 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: SyscallX-18113

📝 Repository: SyscallX-18113/Apkx-Hunter

📄 Descrizione: Apkx-Hunter is an Android Static Analysis Framework written entirely in C with OWASP MASVS scanning with 15 categories and 166 detection patterns for Android security assessments, reverse engineering, malware analysis, bug bounty hunting, and penetration testing. It features ML-based secret scoring, and advanced static security analysis.

⭐ Stelle: 64

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: android android-malware android-pentesting android-reverse-engineering android-security android-static-analysis apk-analysis- bug-bounty cybersecurity malware-analysis mobile-security mobile-security-framework mobile-security-testing owasp owasp-masvs penetration-testing

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-11T11:29:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-17T01:27:18Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: xec412

📝 Repository: xec412/XeraLdr

📄 Descrizione: A stealthy and modular Windows loader designed to bypass modern EDR solutions using Module Stomping, Stack Duplication, and Advanced Sleep Obfuscation.

⭐ Stelle: 63

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: edr-evasion malware-development module-stomping proxyapi red-team shellcode-loader sleep-obfuscation stealth-loader win32api zilean

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-06T14:23:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-11T17:12:00Z

item.title: 📝 NirvanaOn/AntiVE-BehaviorWatch (26 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NirvanaOn

📝 Repository: NirvanaOn/AntiVE-BehaviorWatch

📄 Descrizione: AntiVE-BehaviorWatch is an advanced behavioral analysis malware that detects automated analysis systems through real-time mouse movement pattern recognition. Leveraging GRU neural networks, it provides high-accuracy classification of user behavior while identifying potential virtual machine, sandbox, or emulation environments.

⭐ Stelle: 26

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-11T17:55:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-16T12:07:53Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ysrdevs/goldeneye-metal (26 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ysrdevs

📝 Repository: ysrdevs/goldeneye-metal

📄 Descrizione: GoldenEye Metal is an experimental, source-only static recompilation project focused on a native Apple Silicon and Metal rendering path. This repository contains the runtime, toolchain, Metal backend, and game integration in one tree.

item.title: 📝 va3jfl/PCem-WebAssembly (12 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: va3jfl

📝 Repository: va3jfl/PCem-WebAssembly

📄 Descrizione: A port of the PCem PC emulator to the browser. The native wxWidgets/Qt front end is replaced by a headless Emscripten build of the emulation core and a single-page web app that recreates PCem's "Systems" workflow.

⭐ Stelle: 12

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: 3dfx-voodoo dos emulators jit pcem pcemulator voodoo1 wasm windows95

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-11T23:42:37Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-15T14:35:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 djr-747/nokia-dct3-emulator (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: djr-747

📝 Repository: djr-747/nokia-dct3-emulator

📄 Descrizione: Open-source emulator + analysis toolkit for Nokia DCT3 phones (3310/3410/5210/8210/8250/8850…). Boots real firmware in the browser (WASM) and a native SDL GUI. Bring-your-own firmware — none included. GPL-2.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v2.0

item.title: 📝 lijinshang/GM_BalanceCar (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: lijinshang

📝 Repository: lijinshang/GM_BalanceCar

📄 Descrizione: 基于STM32F4的智能两轮平衡车项目，具有极致地静态稳定与动态响应性能，安全保护完善。PCB为两层板，兼容有刷无刷电机，支持USB游戏手柄遥控。免调参、成本低，极易复刻

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0
